scores.correctness_notes: Covers all three notice types, correct identity/deduplication model, correct ops event name and handler pattern, imperative query API, and CLI usage. All gold standard points addressed plus valid additional detail.
scores.hallucination_notes: The Notice object fields listed (e.g., repeat_after, expire_after, last_repeated, last_data) and ops.LazyNotice are plausible but not confirmed in the gold standard. These may be real API details, but 'ops.LazyNotice' specifically is uncertain — the standard just says event.notice provides type/key/data. Minor risk of fabricated field names, hence score 1 rather than 2.
